title: fagraea pyriformis
intro: Fagraea pyriformis, also known as the dog orchid or yellow dog orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is often used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Fagraea pyriformis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Fagraea pyriformis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
